heading: Carrajung South vs Carranballac — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrajung South, Victoria and Carranballac, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrajung South has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Carranballac (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrajung South or Carranballac safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrajung South has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Carranballac scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrajung South scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Carranballac scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrajung South or Carranballac?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrajung South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
